title: [architect] Create a handoff ADR that defines cloud_ultra as a symbolic
objective: Explain: Create a handoff ADR that defines cloud_ultra as a symbolic reviewer role and future agent team identity, records FlexNetOS/flexnetos_runner as the GitHub operations control plane for reviewer resolution policy, and add/track the work through a .handoff task.
acceptance_criteria: [architect] The deliverable is captured as a reviewable artifact and the existing suite stays green under `cargo test`.
Drift audit passes: no out-of-scope write (edits stay within path_scope) and the intent_lock is unchanged.
